docs.title: Privacy Policies
docs.text: Privacy policies for all apps published by ch3ddr.

docs.title: Apps
docs.text:
• The Cage
  • Camping Village

docs.title: Privacy Policy – Camping Village
docs.text:
Last updated: June 21, 2026

This Privacy Policy explains how the Camping Village app ("we", "our", or "us") handles information when you use it. Camping Village is a festival guide: it shows the camp and stage lineup, an interactive map, and lets you build a personal plan of the sets you want to see.

docs.title: Information We Collect
docs.text:
For festival-goers, the app collects no personal information and requires no account or sign-in.

  • Your personal plan / favourites are stored only on your device and never leave it.
  • App preferences (such as language) and an offline copy of the lineup are cached locally on your device so the app keeps working without a connection.

docs.title: Staff / Admin Access
docs.text: Authorised organisers can unlock editing with a passcode. The passcode grants permission to update the lineup; it is not linked to any personal profile, email address, or phone number. Lineup changes made by staff are saved to our backend (Supabase).

docs.title: Information We Do Not Collect
docs.text:
We do not collect:

  • Names, email addresses, or phone numbers from festival-goers
  • Location data
  • Camera, photos, or contacts
  • Usage analytics, advertising identifiers, or crash reports sent to third parties

The app shows no ads and uses no tracking technologies.

docs.title: Network & Third-Party Services
docs.text:
• The app connects to Supabase to download the public festival lineup (camps, stages, set times). No personal data about you is sent. Supabase's privacy policy: supabase.com/privacy.
  • The interactive map renders from content bundled inside the app.
  • The app may load fonts from Google Fonts (fonts.gstatic.com); no personal data is sent with these requests.
  • Some buttons may open an external website or app-store page in your browser. Once you leave the app, the destination's own privacy policy applies.

docs.title: Data Storage & Retention
docs.text: The lineup is public festival content stored on Supabase. Your personal plan and preferences live only on your device and are removed when you delete the app.

docs.title: Children's Privacy
docs.text: The app is not directed at children under the age of 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

docs.title: Changes to This Policy
docs.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text: Questions about this Privacy Policy? Reach us at: marvin.gruessinger.dev@gmail.com

docs.title: Account & Data Deletion
docs.text: You can request the deletion of your data at any time. The details differ by app.

docs.title: How to request deletion
docs.text:
Send an email to marvin.gruessinger.dev@gmail.com with the subject line:

"Data Deletion Request – The Cage"

Please include your display name in the email so we can identify your account.

docs.title: What will be deleted
docs.text:
• Your display name
  • Your profile photo (if uploaded)
  • Your check-in status and shift claims
  • Any board posts you have created

docs.title: Retention
docs.text: We will process your request within 30 days. No data is retained after deletion.

docs.title: Partial deletion
docs.text: If you'd like to remove only specific data (e.g. your profile photo or board posts) without deleting your full account, mention this in your email and we will handle it accordingly.

docs.title: Camping Village
docs.text: Camping Village does not create an account for festival-goers and does not store personal data about you on our servers. Your plan and favourites are saved only on your device — uninstalling the app removes them completely, with nothing to delete on our side.

docs.title: How to request deletion
docs.text:
If you are a festival organiser / staff member, or otherwise believe we hold data relating to you, email marvin.gruessinger.dev@gmail.com with the subject line:

"Data Deletion Request – Camping Village"

docs.title: Retention
docs.text: We will process any such request within 30 days.

docs.title: Privacy Policy – The Cage
docs.text:
Last updated: June 29, 2026

This Privacy Policy explains how The Cage ("we", "our", or "us") handles information when you use our mobile application.

docs.title: Information We Collect
docs.text:
We collect only the data necessary to provide the app's core functionality:

  • Name / Nickname: When joining the app using an invite code, you provide a name or nickname. This is stored on our servers and is visible to other members within the app. You join with an invite code, so we do not ask for your email, phone number, or real name.
  • Photos & Camera: The app can access your device camera and photo library so you can add images — for example a profile photo, or a victory photo for the in-app "Hall of Cage" (which is shown to other members on a public leaderboard). Authorized users (admins) may also upload gallery and artist photos. Images you upload are stored on our servers; photos you do not upload stay on your device.
  • Content You Submit: Anything you actively submit in the app — such as a "Who's Here" check-in, an event RSVP, or a board or group post — is stored on our servers so other members can see it. This is always something you choose to do.
  • Push Notifications: With your permission, your device is issued a notification token (through a push-notification service) so we can send camp announcements and reminders. The token is used only to deliver notifications — never for tracking or advertising — and you can disable notifications at any time in your device settings.

docs.title: Information We Do Not Collect
docs.text:
We do not collect:

  • Email addresses or phone numbers
  • Location data
  • Usage analytics or crash reports sent to third parties

docs.title: Third-Party Services
docs.text:
The Cage relies on two third-party service providers:

  • A cloud hosting provider — stores the data described above (names, uploaded images, and content you submit).
  • A push-notification service — delivers push notifications to your device.

We do not use any analytics, advertising, or tracking services, and never sell or share your data for advertising.

docs.title: Data Storage
docs.text: The names, images, and content described above are stored on our backend and transmitted over an encrypted (HTTPS/TLS) connection. Data is retained as long as your account is active. To request deletion of your data, contact us at the address below.

docs.title: Children's Privacy
docs.text: Our app is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

docs.title: Changes to This Policy
docs.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text: Questions about this Privacy Policy? Reach us at: marvin.gruessinger.dev@gmail.com
